g.text: Go straight to the tower door.
Step up to the tower door.
Peer through the fogged window instead.
Follow the chain down its shaft.
Pry the hatch and go down.
Turn as {D_DOOR_GATE} slams in the wind.
Give up and read the sketch instead.
Wait for the wind to drop.
Feel it fray and pull back.
Ease it back and re-seat the key.
Stop to trim and relight it.
Follow the passage to the room.
Watch the water climb and think twice.
Take the record to the authorities.
Leave it and photograph it instead.
Relight the lamp as a true light.
Send the light out to sea.
Rig it to call for help.
Log the signal for the record.
